children.text: Repair Manager demonstrates a complete full-stack garage management website with real operational workflows.

children.name: conclusion-support
children.text: The application shows frontend design, REST API engineering, database modeling, JWT authentication, and deployment awareness in one coherent website.
Frontend: React dashboard, customer portal, forms, filters, status badges, and computed KPIs.
Backend: Express routes, CORS rules, health check, JWT auth, and protected repair APIs.
Database: User and RepairJob models with ownership, tracking codes, statuses, costs, and dates.
Next: tests, validation, rate limiting, production secret policy, roles, and repair history.
